result:
F7 implementation complete. Report:

**Files (all Agent-B-owned, committed `9d7a4c6`, isolated — nothing else touched):**
- `nd-unfolding/pet/fullevent_fps_dataloader.py` — F7 core: `coherent_bootstrap_factors` (global Poisson per inventory before any subset), `build_negweight_refined_target` (bkg factor × −w_bkg·pot_scale **before** Stay-Positive; per-replica rebuild), `stay_positive_refine_binned`, `inventory_order_hash`, `validate_coherent_bootstrap` (fail-closed), and `build_fullevent_loaders` rewired (global-before-subset indexed by imc/ida — **post-subsample redraw removed**; `bkg_mode` with negweight-refined default failing closed without the background inventory, purity=labeled control).
- `nd-unfolding/tests/test_fullevent_fps.py` — `F7CoherentBootstrap` (7 tests).
- `nd-unfolding/pet/smoke_fullevent_fps.py`, `closure_fullevent_fps.py` — pass `bkg_mode="purity"` (xps2 scaffolding).
- `nd-unfolding/pet/FULL_EVENT_FEATURE_CONTRACT.md`, `PET_P1_P5_SESSION_STATE.md` — background-treatment freeze + F7 status/verdict.

**Tests: 19/19 CPU pass** (login-safe; no GPU/Slurm/C++/P3F launched). The 6 required + one extra: deterministic replay; global-before-subset (subset factor = restriction of the one canonical global draw); same-training/extraction-MC (validator re-derives it); background-factor-before-refinement; no-nominal-refinement-reuse (different seed → different refined target); deliberate seed/factor/fingerprint/inventory-hash mismatch fails closed; negweight-refined fails closed without the background inventory. The fail-closed paths are the login-safe smoke.

**Preserved:** my prior `import hashlib` partial edit; all unrelated dirty work (pet_*.py, uq_4d/corrected/, docs/orchestration/RUNS.tsv, other sessions' files) untouched; explicit staging only.

**Limitations:** the Stay-Positive refinement here is the closed-form binned realization for the coherence tests — production uses the trained `refine_stay_positive` classifier (rebuilt per replica). The DataLoader-level literal background-cloud injection (measured-side clouds at −w) is not wired because there are no background clouds to inject yet; the coherent factor/target machinery is ready to feed it.

**Verdict: EVIDENCE-BLOCKED** (not CLOSED). The coherent 3-inventory contract is code-complete and unit-verified, and forbids the post-subsample redraw, but it cannot execute or be certified until the named missing runtime artifact exists: the Option-A background-cloud omnifile `runEventLoopOmniFold_PC_FPS_MEFHC_bkgcloud.root` (bkgcloud dump chain `sbatch_evloop_array_pointcloud_fps_bkgcloud.sh`, submitted then cancelled 2026-07-11 for auditor fixes) plus re-dumped full-event FPS PC inputs carrying aligned background clouds/scalars/`w_bkg` row-aligned to the signal/data order. The current xps2 scaffolding has no background inventory, so `bkg_mode="negweight-refined"` correctly fails closed today.
